title: Prove the Bash installer transaction end to end
action: Implement the Linux half of D2 and D8 after cells 1 and 2. Make planning dry-run and all pre-confirmation paths free of mutating plugin calls and target/home writes while allowing read-only status probes. After confirmation, transition the selected fake/runtime plugin, re-probe and revalidate, then apply onboarding and require exact source/onboarding/runtime/projection version equality, drift false, and immediate up_to_date recheck before success. Build an isolated Bash E2E harness using temp HOME/USERPROFILE/CLAUDE_HOME/CODEX_HOME, PATH-isolated fake Codex/Claude CLIs, deny sentinels, and call logs. Cover greenfield missing and empty targets, brownfield, repo-copy, plugin-first, noninteractive prompt refusal, paths with spaces and Unicode, missing runtime CLI, unavailable source, package-list shape drift, equal/older/newer/unknown source-target versions, mixed-source refusal, owner-state preservation, and repeat idempotency. Inject a failure immediately after plugin transition but before onboarding: restore the pre-run plugin enabled/installed state, leave the target digest unchanged, report both the primary failure and any rollback failure, and exit nonzero.

truths: Greenfield missing/empty and brownfield Bash runs finish on one exact release version with complete onboarding and no drift
Dry-run and pre-confirmation paths produce zero target/home writes and zero mutating plugin calls while read-only probes remain allowed
Fake CLI call logs prove plugin transition occurs only after confirmation and a mutation-free preview
Noninteractive prompt refusal, spaces/Unicode paths, missing CLI, unavailable source, and package-list shape drift fail loudly without unauthorized mutation
Equal older newer unknown and mixed version cases follow the locked upgrade/refusal rules
An injected post-transition pre-onboarding failure restores the exact pre-run plugin state and leaves the target digest unchanged
Rollback failure is reported alongside the primary failure and never converted to success
Repeat install reports current without timestamp-only managed rewrites

artifacts.substantive: fixture-isolated Bash runner covering the full plan matrix with fake CLI ordering logs, deny sentinels, exact manifest/version postconditions, and rollback assertions
mutation-free preview, confirmed plugin transition, rollback, and strict final postcondition checks

key_links: The wrapper consumes the strict source tuple established by onboarding and compares every final target surface against it
Fake runtime CLIs are selected only through the fixture PATH and classify read-only probes separately from mutating calls for ordering/rollback assertions
The configured verify command includes the complete Bash E2E matrix
prohibitions: Do not access or mutate real user homes or installed plugins
Do not treat a plugin-state fixture as a substitute for transition ordering proof
Do not claim PowerShell execution or release readiness from this cell
Do not touch scripts/install.ps1 or unfinished wait/worktree files
